# CASE: nex-case-024-kds-workflow

## Tier
3 — KDS workflow collapse touches order advance path (`KdsController::advance`) while keeping `OrderStatus` enum and [[order-state.contract]] transitions contract-safe via internal two-hop `in_progress → ready → served`.

## Problem
Kitchen Display used a 4-step workflow (New → Preparing → Ready → Served) with local-only state mutation (no backend API calls). PDF recommendations #2/#3 require a simplified Preparing/Served kitchen flow with clearer button labels.

## Pre-check (Case C gates, read-only)
- **Best-selling package (#6):** no `package_id` on `device_orders` — descope until data model exists.
- **Branch widget (#10):** `Branch` model + `LocalBranchResolver` exist (single-branch installs) — static widget feasible in Case C.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

### Workflow collapse (#2, #3)
- Frontend `nextStateFor`: `new → preparing → served` (no kitchen-facing Ready step).
- `stateLabel`: backend `ready` maps to "Preparing" in UI.
- `KdsFilterChips` / command bar: removed Ready filter and metric.
- `KdsTicketCard`: buttons are "Start Preparing" and "Mark as Served".

### Backend two-hop serve (contract-safe)
- `KdsController::advance()`: from `in_progress`, when all items done, transitions `in_progress → ready → served` in one locked transaction.
- `toKdsState()` and `OrderBroadcastPayload::toKdsState()`: `READY` maps to `preparing` for KDS display.
- `nextStatus()` no longer exposes `in_progress → ready` as a single user action.

### Backend wiring (prerequisite)
- Added `kdsApi.ts` with CSRF-aware `fetch` to `kds.advance` and `kds.toggle-item`.
- `Display.vue` uses `useKdsBoard` + `useKdsEcho` for realtime sync; removed local-only mutation.

### Recall removed (#decision)
- "Recall to Line" was frontend-only with no backend route — removed from `KdsTicketCard` and `Display.vue`.

## Code Simplification
Removed unused `applyRecall` and `RECALL_TARGET` from `kdsHelpers.ts` after recall UI removal. code-simplifier subagent unavailable.

|------|--------|
| `resources/js/components/KDS/kdsApi.ts` | New — API helpers for advance/toggle |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/kdsHelpers.ts` | Collapsed workflow, filter preparing includes ready, removed recall helpers |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/kdsHelpers.test.ts` | Updated Mark as Served gating tests |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/KdsTicketCard.vue` | Labels, removed recall |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/KdsFilterChips.vue` | Removed Ready chip |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/KdsCommandBar.vue` | Removed Ready metric |
| `resources/js/components/KDS/useKdsBoard.ts` | Normalize ready → preparing on echo |
| `resources/js/pages/KDS/Display.vue` | Wired to backend + echo |
| `app/Http/Controllers/Admin/KdsController.php` | Two-hop serve, KDS state mapping |
| `app/Helpers/OrderBroadcastPayload.php` | READY → preparing in broadcast |
